api.name: LocalLLMPlugin
api.docs: The main plugin interface for interacting with on-device LLMs.

tags.text: ios
tags.name: platform

tags.text: android
tags.name: platform

methods.name: systemAvailability

tags.name: example
returns
tags.text: A promise that resolves with the system availability status

methods.docs:
Checks the availability status of the on-device LLM.

Use this method to determine if the LLM is ready to use, needs to be downloaded,
or is unavailable on the device.

methods.name: download

tags.name: platform
tags.text: android

tags.name: example
returns
tags.text: A promise that resolves when the download completes

methods.docs:
Downloads the on-device LLM model.

This method initiates the download of the LLM model when it's not already
present on the device. Only available on Android.

methods.name: prompt

parameters.name: options
parameters.docs: - The prompt options including the text prompt and optional configuration

tags.name: example
param
tags.text: options - The prompt options including the text prompt and optional configuration

tags.name: returns
tags.text: A promise that resolves with the LLM's text response

methods.docs:
Sends a prompt to the on-device LLM and receives a response.

Use this method to interact with the LLM. You can optionally provide a sessionId
to maintain conversation context across multiple prompts.

methods.name: endSession

parameters.name: options
parameters.docs: - The options containing the sessionId to end

tags.name: example
param
tags.text: options - The options containing the sessionId to end

tags.name: returns
tags.text: A promise that resolves when the session is ended

methods.docs:
Ends an active LLM session.

Use this method to clean up resources when you're done with a conversation session.
This is important for managing memory and preventing resource leaks.

methods.name: generateImage

parameters.name: options
parameters.docs: - The image generation options including the prompt, optional reference images, and count

tags.name: platform
tags.text: ios

tags.name: example
param
tags.text: options - The image generation options including the prompt, optional reference images, and count

tags.name: returns
tags.text: A promise that resolves with an array of generated image data

methods.docs:
Generates images from a text prompt using the on-device LLM.

Use this method to create images based on text descriptions. Optionally provide
reference images to influence the generation. The generated images are returned
as base64-encoded PNG strings in an array.

methods.name: warmup

parameters.name: options
parameters.docs: - The warmup options including the prompt prefix

tags.name: example
param
tags.text: options - The warmup options including the prompt prefix

tags.name: returns
tags.text: A promise that resolves when warmup is complete

methods.docs:
Warms up the on-device LLM for faster initial responses.

Use this method to pre-initialize the LLM with a prompt prefix, reducing latency
for the first actual prompt. This is useful when you know in advance the type of
prompts you'll be sending.

methods.name: addListener

parameters.name: eventName
parameters.docs: - The event name to listen for

parameters.name: listenerFunc
parameters.docs: - The callback invoked with the new availability status on each change

tags.name: example
param
tags.text: eventName - The event name to listen for

tags.name: param
tags.text: listenerFunc - The callback invoked with the new availability status on each change

tags.name: returns
tags.text: A handle that can be used to remove this specific listener

methods.docs:
Registers a listener that is called whenever the on-device LLM availability status changes.

The listener is invoked with the new availability status each time it changes. Polling
begins when the first listener is added and stops when all listeners are removed via
`removeAllListeners()`.

interfaces.name: SystemAvailabilityResponse
interfaces.docs: Response containing the system availability status of the on-device LLM.

properties.name: status
properties.docs: The current availability status of the LLM.

interfaces.name: PromptResponse
interfaces.docs: Response from the LLM after processing a prompt.

properties.name: text
properties.docs: The text response generated by the LLM.

interfaces.name: PromptOptions
interfaces.docs: Options for sending a prompt to the LLM.

properties.name: sessionId
properties.docs:
Optional session identifier for maintaining conversation context.

Provide the same sessionId across multiple prompts to maintain context.
If not provided, each prompt is treated as independent.

properties.name: instructions

tags.text: 'You are a helpful assistant that provides concise answers.'
tags.name: example

properties.docs:
System-level instructions to guide the LLM's behavior.

Use this to set the role, tone, or constraints for the LLM's responses.

properties.name: options
properties.docs: Configuration options for controlling LLM inference behavior.

properties.name: prompt
properties.docs: The text prompt to send to the LLM.

interfaces.name: LLMOptions
interfaces.docs: Configuration options for LLM inference behavior.

properties.name: temperature
properties.docs:
Controls randomness in the model's output.

Higher values (e.g., 0.8) make output more random, while lower values
(e.g., 0.2) make it more focused and deterministic.

properties.name: maximumOutputTokens
properties.docs:
The maximum number of tokens to generate in the response.

On Android, this must be between 1 and 256.

interfaces.name: EndSessionOptions
interfaces.docs: Options for ending an active LLM session.

properties.name: sessionId
properties.docs:
The identifier of the session to end.

This should match the sessionId used in previous prompt() calls.

interfaces.name: GenerateImageResponse
interfaces.docs: Response containing the generated image data.

properties.name: pngBase64Images

tags.text: ['iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUg...', 'iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUg...']
tags.name: example

properties.docs:
Array of generated images as base64-encoded PNG strings.

Each string contains raw base64 data (without data URI prefix).
To use in an img tag, prefix with 'data:image/png;base64,'.

interfaces.name: GenerateImageOptions
interfaces.docs: Options for generating an image from a text prompt.

properties.name: prompt
properties.docs: The text prompt describing the image to generate.

properties.name: promptImages

tags.text: ['data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGg...', '/9j/4AAQSkZJRg...']
tags.name: example

properties.docs:
Optional array of reference images to influence the generated output.

Provide base64-encoded image strings (with or without data URI prefix) that
will be used as visual context or inspiration for the image generation.
This allows you to combine text and image concepts for more controlled output.

properties.name: count
properties.docs:
The number of image variations to generate.

Defaults to 1 if not specified.

interfaces.name: WarmupOptions
interfaces.docs: Options for warming up the on-device LLM.

properties.name: sessionId

tags.text: ios
tags.name: platform

properties.docs:
The session identifier for the warmup.

This identifier will be associated with the warmed-up session,
allowing you to use the same session for subsequent prompts.

properties.name: promptPrefix

tags.text: ios
tags.name: platform

tags.text: 'You are a helpful assistant that provides concise answers.'
tags.name: example

properties.docs:
The prompt prefix to use for warming up the LLM.

This text will be used to pre-initialize the model, reducing latency
for subsequent prompts with similar prefixes.

typeAliases.name: LLMAvailability
typeAliases.docs: Availability status of the on-device LLM.

typeAliases.name: SystemAvailabilityChangeListener
typeAliases.docs: Callback invoked when the on-device LLM availability status changes.
